_comment: State PUC tariff filing portals. Use these to find tariff documents for any IOU in the state. Munis and co-ops are not regulated here — go to the utility website directly.

AK.name: Regulatory Commission of Alaska
AK.notes: Search by utility name for electric tariff schedules

AL.name: Alabama Public Service Commission
AL.notes: Lists Alabama Power, Southern Company subsidiaries

AR.name: Arkansas Public Service Commission
AR.notes: Docket search — filter by utility name and electric tariff

AZ.name: Arizona Corporation Commission
AZ.notes: APS, TEP, UniSource tariffs listed here

CA.name: California Public Utilities Commission
CA.notes: Full tariff books for PG&E, SCE, SDG&E. E-Tariff portal — search by schedule code

CO.name: Colorado Public Utilities Commission
CO.notes: Xcel PSCo, Black Hills, Holy Cross filings

FL.name: Florida Public Service Commission
FL.notes: FPL, Duke Energy Florida, Tampa Electric, Gulf Power tariff filings

IA.name: Iowa Utilities Board
IA.notes: MidAmerican Energy, Alliant Energy, Interstate Power tariffs

ID.name: Idaho Public Utilities Commission
ID.notes: Idaho Power, Rocky Mountain Power (PacifiCorp), Avista tariffs

IL.name: Illinois Commerce Commission
IL.notes: ComEd, Ameren Illinois tariff filings — large C&I schedules under 'General Service Large Load'

IN.name: Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission
IN.notes: IPL (AES Indiana), Duke Indiana, Indiana Michigan Power, NIPSCO

KS.name: Kansas Corporation Commission
KS.notes: Evergy Kansas (formerly KCPL/Westar), Evergy Metro tariffs

KY.name: Kentucky Public Service Commission
KY.notes: LG&E, Kentucky Utilities (PPL) tariff filings — search e-filing docket

LA.name: Louisiana Public Service Commission
LA.notes: Entergy Louisiana, Cleco, Southwestern Electric Power tariffs

MA.name: Massachusetts Department of Public Utilities
MA.notes: Eversource MA, National Grid MA, Unitil tariffs

MD.name: Maryland Public Service Commission
MD.notes: BGE, Pepco MD, Delmarva MD, Potomac Edison tariff search

ME.name: Maine Public Utilities Commission
ME.notes: Central Maine Power, Versant Power tariffs

MI.name: Michigan Public Service Commission
MI.notes: DTE Electric, Consumers Energy tariff filings

MN.name: Minnesota Public Utilities Commission
MN.notes: Xcel Energy (NSP MN), Minnesota Power, Otter Tail — search electric tariff filings

MO.name: Missouri Public Service Commission
MO.notes: AmerenMissouri, Evergy Missouri Metro (KCPL), KCP&L Greater MO tariffs

MS.name: Mississippi Public Service Commission
MS.notes: Entergy Mississippi, Mississippi Power, Singing River tariffs

NC.name: North Carolina Utilities Commission
NC.notes: Duke Energy Carolinas, Duke Energy Progress, Dominion NC tariffs

ND.name: North Dakota Public Service Commission
ND.notes: Montana-Dakota Utilities, Xcel NSP ND, Otter Tail ND tariffs

NE.name: Nebraska Power Review Board
NE.notes: Nebraska is mostly public power (NPPD, LES, OPPD) — no traditional PUC. Go to each utility website directly.

NH.name: New Hampshire Public Utilities Commission
NH.notes: Eversource NH, Unitil NH, New Hampshire Electric Cooperative tariffs

NJ.name: New Jersey Board of Public Utilities
NJ.notes: PSE&G, JCP&L (FirstEnergy), Atlantic City Electric tariffs

NM.name: New Mexico Public Regulation Commission
NM.notes: PNM (Public Service Company of NM), El Paso Electric, Southwestern Public Service tariffs

NV.name: Nevada Public Utilities Commission
NV.notes: NV Energy (Nevada Power + Sierra Pacific) tariff filings — both rate zones searchable here

NY.name: New York Department of Public Service
NY.notes: Con Ed, National Grid NY, NYSEG, Central Hudson, Orange & Rockland tariff filings

OH.name: Public Utilities Commission of Ohio
OH.notes: Duke Energy Ohio, AEP Ohio, FirstEnergy Ohio (Ohio Edison/CEI/TE), Dayton Power & Light

OK.name: Oklahoma Corporation Commission
OK.notes: Oklahoma Gas & Electric (OG&E), Public Service Co of Oklahoma (PSO/AEP) tariffs

OR.name: Oregon Public Utility Commission
OR.notes: Portland General Electric, Pacific Power (PacifiCorp), Idaho Power OR, Avista OR tariffs

PA.name: Pennsylvania Public Utility Commission
PA.notes: PECO, PPL Electric, West Penn Power, Duquesne Light, MetEd, Penelec tariffs

SC.name: South Carolina Office of Regulatory Staff
SC.notes: Duke Energy Carolinas SC, Duke Energy Progress SC, Dominion SC tariffs

SD.name: South Dakota Public Utilities Commission
SD.notes: Montana-Dakota Utilities, Black Hills Power, Northern States Power SD tariffs

TN.name: Tennessee Valley Authority (FERC-regulated federal utility)
TN.notes: TVA is a federal utility, not state-regulated. Rate schedules published directly on tva.com. Large Power (LP) rate is the primary C&I tariff.

TX.name: Public Utility Commission of Texas
TX.notes: Delivery-only IOUs: Oncor, CenterPoint, AEP Texas, TNMP. Texas is deregulated — look for wires/T&D tariffs specifically. Retail rates are through REPs, not here.

UT.name: Utah Public Service Commission
UT.notes: Rocky Mountain Power (PacifiCorp), Dominion Energy Utah tariffs

VA.name: Virginia State Corporation Commission
VA.notes: Dominion Energy Virginia, Appalachian Power (AEP), Rappahannock Electric Cooperative tariffs

VT.name: Vermont Department of Public Service
VT.notes: Green Mountain Power, Central Vermont Public Service tariffs

WA.name: Washington Utilities and Transportation Commission
WA.notes: Puget Sound Energy, Pacific Power WA (PacifiCorp), Avista WA, Pacific Gas Transmission tariffs

WI.name: Wisconsin Public Service Commission
WI.notes: WE Energies (Wisconsin Electric), WPS, Madison Gas & Electric, Alliant Energy WI tariffs

WV.name: West Virginia Public Service Commission
WV.notes: Appalachian Power (AEP), Monongalia Power, Wheeling Power tariffs

WY.name: Wyoming Public Service Commission
WY.notes: Rocky Mountain Power (PacifiCorp), Montana-Dakota Utilities WY, Black Hills Power WY tariffs
